pr.title: Record: Int6 + Canon ACD (K=3) + Muon WD 0.04 + SWA + Sliding Eval (val_bpb=1.1668)

output.summary: Pairs Canon ACD placements with mixed int6 quantization and Muon+Adam+SWA training while tracking sliding-window evals on the 9-layer decoder.
techniques: mixed PTQ int6 on mlp/attn tensors
Canon ACD before attention/MLP to skip expensive B placement
Muon+Adam with SWA plus warmdown schedule
